evals.name: direct-trigger-en

evals.name: indirect-trigger
evals.prompt: I'm out of content ideas, help me brainstorm
evals.expected_output: Skill 'tr-brainstorm' is correctly matched despite indirect phrasing
expectations: Routes to tr-brainstorm skill despite not using exact keywords
Asks for necessary clarifications before proceeding

evals.name: output-structure
evals.prompt: brainstorm content topics about AI. Use minimal sample data — I just want to verify the output format is correct.
evals.expected_output: Produces output matching the skill's documented deliverable format
expectations: Artifact is saved to the correct path per conventions
Markdown formatting is correct if applicable
